posts.text: Can we somehow get this to be a question asked at the national level? I can talk about it on my show, but that won’t be enough. Can we get this question to more hosts? Somehow force a debate the whole nation weighs in on. Does it have to be our troops? Why can’t Israel do it?
posts.quote: Can we somehow get this to be a question asked at the national level? I can talk about it on my show, but that won’t be enough. Can we get this question to more hosts? Somehow force a debate the whole nation weighs in on. Does it have to be our troops? Why can’t Israel do it?

posts.text:
Why are we sending 5,000 troops to the Gulf? Israel wanted this war. Why dont they send in the ground troops? 

Why is this not even being discussed as an option? Is it just taken for granted in DC that Americans have to do Israel's dirty work or that our lives are less valuable?
posts.quote:
Why are we sending 5,000 troops to the Gulf? Israel wanted this war. Why dont they send in the ground troops? 

Why is this not even being discussed as an option? Is it just taken for granted in DC that Americans have to do Israel's dirty work or that our lives are less valuable?

posts.text: Trump is sending in 5,000 ground troops to the Gulf. Marine expeditionary unit will be able to conduct ground operations. Several more warships and F-35s are on the way, too. I thought they said this was supposed to be easy and they weren't going to use ground troops. Here we go.
posts.quote: Trump is sending in 5,000 ground troops to the Gulf. Marine expeditionary unit will be able to conduct ground operations. Several more warships and F-35s are on the way, too. I thought they said this was supposed to be easy and they weren't going to use ground troops. Here we go.

posts.text: Who is fighting harder against this war - Tucker Carlson or Chuck Schumer and Hakeem Jeffries? Not close, right? It's embarrassing to have Democratic leaders outflanked on the anti-war position by some on the right. Democratic leaders are pathetic controlled opposition. Useless.

posts.text: The reason is obvious. Democratic leadership also works for Israel. And they secretly love this war. That's why there isn't a peep out of them. And the so-called progressives are cowards who are afraid the media will call them antisemites and ruin their beloved careers.

posts.text: Sorry, the updated number is 13 American service members killed. So, three more than I just said. And we haven't yet run out of interceptor missiles. The fact that we will is a mathematical certainty. So, what do we do with our ships when we have no missiles to defend them?

posts.text: We have a delusional leader. Forget surrendering, the Iranians say they have no interest in cease fire talks. They want to keep going. Time is on their side. Longer the war goes, the less defensive missiles we have and the longer the Strait is closed and our economies are fucked.

posts.text: Now there are three more dead Americans. And it turns out 16 ships have been hit in Strait of Hormuz. Meanwhile, Trump told G7 leaders Iran is "about to surrender." In reality, they're completely dug in. When they asked the Mad King what his goal for the war was, he didn't know.
